skills.rationale: Default eval-capable skill for agentic builds because LLM features need regression fixtures, not only visual smoke checks.

skills.name: RDS mockup fidelity
skills.description: Runs the stack-specific mockup analog verifier and writes a diff report under builds/<id>/mockup-diff.
skills.rationale: Default RDS skill because visual output must be compared against the intended mockup or analog before claiming the preview is done.

skills.name: RDS secrets broker
skills.description: Records secret requirements without copying or exposing actual secret values.
skills.rationale: Default RDS skill for all stacks because any generated app can introduce credentials, analytics keys, OAuth, webhooks, or deploy secrets, and generated apps must not hardcode or expose secret values.
